name: PAY_BALANCE_GROUPS_VL
query: SELECT pbg.BALANCE_GROUP_ID BALANCE_GROUP_ID, pbg.BASE_GROUP_NAME BASE_GROUP_NAME, pbgtl.GROUP_NAME GROUP_NAME, pbgtl.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, pbg.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, pbg.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE, pbg.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, pbg.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, pbg.BALANCE_CATEGORY_ATT_FLAG BALANCE_CATEGORY_ATT_FLAG, pbg.BALANCE_DIMENSION_ATT_FLAG BALANCE_DIMENSION_ATT_FLAG, pbg.GROUP_LEVEL_FLAG GROUP_LEVEL_FLAG, pbg.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, pbg.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, pbg.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, pbg.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, pbg.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, pbg.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER FROM PAY_BALANCE_GROUPS pbg, PAY_BALANCE_GROUPS_TL pbgtl WHERE pbgtl.BALANCE_GROUP_ID = pbg.BALANCE_GROUP_ID AND pbgtl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
